mapper.select:
SELECT c.center_id AS centerId, c.center_name AS centerName, c.center_region AS centerRegion, c.center_content AS centerContent, c.latitude, c.longitude, c.created_at AS createdAt, st.category AS category, st.base_fee AS baseFee, COUNT(DISTINCT r.room_id) AS roomCount, COUNT(DISTINCT cr.account_id) AS reviewCount, ROUND(AVG(cr.grade), 1) AS avgGrade, MIN(r.room_id) AS firstRoomId FROM centers c LEFT JOIN rooms r ON c.center_id = r.center_id LEFT JOIN sports_type st ON r.sport_id = st.sport_id LEFT JOIN centers_reviews cr ON c.center_id = cr.center_id WHERE 1=1
AND c.center_region = #{region}
AND st.category = #{category}
GROUP BY c.center_id, c.center_name, c.center_region, c.center_content, c.latitude, c.longitude, c.created_at, st.category, st.base_fee
ORDER BY st.base_fee ASC
ORDER BY st.base_fee DESC
ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT cr.account_id) DESC, ROUND(AVG(cr.grade), 1) DESC, c.created_at DESC
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.center_id AS centerId, c.center_name AS centerName, c.center_region AS centerRegion, c.center_content AS centerContent, c.latitude, c.longitude, c.created_at AS createdAt, st.category AS category, st.base_fee AS baseFee, COUNT(DISTINCT r.room_id) AS roomCount, COUNT(DISTINCT cr.account_id) AS reviewCount, ROUND(AVG(cr.grade), 1) AS avgGrade FROM centers c LEFT JOIN rooms r ON c.center_id = r.center_id LEFT JOIN sports_type st ON r.sport_id = st.sport_id LEFT JOIN centers_reviews cr ON c.center_id = cr.center_id WHERE c.center_id = #{centerId} GROUP BY c.center_id, c.center_name, c.center_region, c.center_content, c.latitude, c.longitude, c.created_at, st.category, st.base_fee

SELECT c.center_id AS centerId, c.center_name AS centerName, c.center_region AS centerRegion, c.center_content AS centerContent, c.latitude, c.longitude, c.created_at AS createdAt, st.category AS category, st.base_fee AS baseFee, COUNT(DISTINCT r.room_id) AS roomCount, COUNT(DISTINCT cr.account_id) AS reviewCount, ROUND(AVG(cr.grade), 1) AS avgGrade, MIN(r.room_id) AS firstRoomId FROM centers c LEFT JOIN rooms r ON c.center_id = r.center_id LEFT JOIN sports_type st ON r.sport_id = st.sport_id LEFT JOIN centers_reviews cr ON c.center_id = cr.center_id WHERE c.center_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR c.center_region LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR st.category LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' GROUP BY c.center_id, c.center_name, c.center_region, c.center_content, c.latitude, c.longitude, c.created_at, st.category, st.base_fee ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM rnum FROM ( SELECT c.center_id AS centerId, c.center_name AS centerName, c.center_region AS centerRegion, c.center_content AS centerContent, c.latitude, c.longitude, c.created_at AS createdAt, st.category AS category, st.base_fee AS baseFee, COUNT(DISTINCT r.room_id) AS roomCount, COUNT(DISTINCT cr.account_id) AS reviewCount, ROUND(AVG(cr.grade), 1) AS avgGrade, MIN(r.room_id) AS firstRoomId FROM centers c LEFT JOIN rooms r ON c.center_id = r.center_id LEFT JOIN sports_type st ON r.sport_id = st.sport_id LEFT JOIN centers_reviews cr ON c.center_id = cr.center_id WHERE c.center_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR c.center_region LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR st.category LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' GROUP BY c.center_id, c.center_name, c.center_region, c.center_content, c.latitude, c.longitude, c.created_at, st.category, st.base_fee ORDER BY c.created_at DESC ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= (#{offset} + #{pageSize}) ) WHERE rnum > #{offset}

SELECT r.room_id AS roomId, r.center_id AS centerId, r.sport_id AS sportId, st.category, st.base_fee AS baseFee, r.room_id AS roomNumber,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM room_booking rb WHERE rb.room_id = r.room_id AND rb.account_id = #{accountId, jdbcType=INTEGER} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
0
AS bookmarked FROM rooms r JOIN sports_type st ON r.sport_id = st.sport_id WHERE r.room_id = #{roomId}

SELECT r.room_id AS roomId, r.center_id AS centerId, r.sport_id AS sportId, st.category, st.base_fee AS baseFee, r.room_id AS roomNumber,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM room_booking rb WHERE rb.room_id = r.room_id AND rb.account_id = #{accountId, jdbcType=INTEGER} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
0
AS bookmarked
FROM rooms r JOIN sports_type st ON r.sport_id = st.sport_id WHERE r.center_id = #{centerId} ORDER BY r.room_id

SELECT v.nickname AS displayName, v.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, v.hati_code AS hatiCode, v.gender AS gender, v.role_type AS roleType, v.account_id AS accountId, v.handle AS handle FROM vw_account_display v WHERE v.account_id = #{accountId}
